title: specklinia oblonga
intro: Specklinia oblonga, also known as the 'Oval Leaf Pleurothallis', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Specklinia oblonga include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to promote relaxation and ease respiratory discomfort.
